CustomField.description: The api name of the field on the Contact Object. This Contact field must be a checkbox. By populating this field name, whenever the contact field is checked, the badge appears on the contact card.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The api name of the field on the Contact Object. This Contact field must be a checkbox. By populating this field name, whenever the contact field is checked, the badge appears on the contact card.
CustomField.label: Contact Field API Name
